heroNarrative.name: Juan Almeida
heroNarrative.headline: Hello World
heroNarrative.translatorLine: I build AI systems, automations, and applications that ship.

bio.narrative:
I'm a full-stack engineer who builds end-to-end — from data pipelines and AI integrations to the interfaces people actually use. I've shipped search platforms handling millions of records, courier logistics systems, and machine-learning workflows that run in production.

My work sits at the intersection of product thinking and engineering depth. I don't just write code; I figure out what needs to exist, then build it. TypeScript, Python, React, Django, cloud infrastructure — I pick the right tool for the problem, not the other way around.

I care about software that works reliably, scales gracefully, and solves real problems. No over-engineering, no hype — just useful things, built well.

skillMatrix.subtitle: The stack I reach for — grouped by what it does.

proofPoints.build: Shipped reactive interfaces and SSR apps serving millions of page views with React, Next.js, and Astro.
proofPoints.scale: Designed backend systems and APIs handling 10M+ records — search platforms, logistics engines, data pipelines.
proofPoints.ai: Built production ML workflows, RAG pipelines, and AI integrations that run reliably at scale.
proofPoints.ship: Containerized deployments, automated CI/CD, and infrastructure-as-code across AWS, Docker, and edge platforms.

workLog.subtitle: Projects I've built and the problems they solve.

contact.headline: Let's build something.
contact.description: I'm always open to interesting projects, collaborations, or just a good technical conversation.

seo.title: Juan Almeida | Full Stack & AI Engineer
seo.description: Juan Almeida is a full-stack and AI engineer specializing in TypeScript, Python, React, and Django. He builds search platforms, AI agent pipelines, logistics systems, and voice AI orchestrators.
